vocab.example: My major in Environmental Science requires an interdisciplinary approach, combining biology, law, and economics.
In the first two years of my degree, I focused on gaining foundational knowledge in macroeconomics.

vocab.meaning: bắt đầu theo học một văn bằng
vocab.example: I decided to embark on a degree in Mechanical Engineering because of my fascination with robotics.

vocab.meaning: nghiên cứu tiên tiến/hiện đại nhất
vocab.example: The department is renowned for its cutting-edge research into artificial intelligence and machine learning.

vocab.meaning: những nền tảng/cơ sở lý thuyết
vocab.example: Psychology is fascinating because it explores the theoretical underpinnings of human behavior.

vocab.meaning: đào tạo nghề/mang tính thực hành cao
vocab.example: My course provides excellent vocational training, ensuring we are job-ready the moment we graduate.
The most rewarding part of Architecture is seeing the practical application of our blueprints in real-world structures.

vocab.meaning: sự khắt khe/nghiêm ngặt trong học thuật
vocab.example: The academic rigor of the Medical program is intense, but it prepares us for the high-pressure environment of a hospital.

vocab.meaning: mở rộng tầm hiểu biết/tầm mắt
vocab.example: Studying International Relations has truly helped to broaden my horizons regarding global politics.

vocab.meaning: theo đuổi sự nghiệp trong lĩnh vực
vocab.example: I am currently specializing in Digital Marketing as I intend to pursue a career in the tech industry.
